steps.t: You should free Reginard from his bindings.
Reginard has asked you to find his pack, which must be somewhere in Lhúngobel.
You have found Reginard's pack with most of its contents ruined. You should retrieve his pack for him.
Reginard is waiting for you outside of Lhúngobel. You should return to him with his pack and what remains of his belongings.
Reginard has invited you to meet up with him back at his camp-site. His camp-site is in the marsh south of Lhúngobel.
You have found Reginard back at his camp-site. You should talk to him.
